svg.title: PlantMind five-layer architecture
svg.desc: A vertical pipeline turning NASA C-MAPSS sensor data into a ranked, proven corrective action: Data, Prediction, Diagnosis, Counterfactual engine, and Prove plus learn.
svg.text: PlantMind — from sensor stream to proven fix
Predict the failure · decide the fix · prove it on real NASA data

g.text: Random forest → RUL score → flag RED if < 30 cycles
Agent walks asset graph → root cause → 3–4 candidate fixes
Surrogate twin per action → Götze score → argmax picks winner
RED→GREEN replay chart → recalibrate twin weights (closed loop)

svg.text: AI does the uncertain work (predict, reason, imagine). Deterministic rules make every actual decision (flag, score, pick).
